name: Dirzuga Reinforcements
text: When you produce units: place a Dizurga token onto either a planet that has a unit with production or 3 infantry you control. Then, return this card to the Arborec Diaspora player.

name: Cortical Backup
text: ACTION: place this card in your play area. During your tactical actions, you may treat non-fighter neutral ships as if they were your own. If you move neutral units or activate a system that contains 1 or more of the H4L1R's player's units, return this card to the H4L1R player.

name: Mental Clarity
text: After another player moves ships into a system that contains your units; you may reveal this card and choose ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE, SPACE CANNON, BOMBARDMENT, SUSTAIN DAMAGE or PRODUCTION. Other players cannot use that unit ability in this system this turn. At the end of the turn, return this card to the Neurovoid player.

name: Transit Indulgence
text: When you activate a system, place this card face up in your play area. While this card is in your area, you are not an outlaw. Return a decree to the Xxcha player and return their command token from your faction sheet. At the end of your turn, return this card to the Xxcha player.

name: Eramina Elixer
text: When you would research a technology; you may reveal this card and gain 1 random genome instead. Then, retrun this card to the Moyin player.

name: Covert Channel
text: At any time: you may discard any number of action cards. For each action card discarded, you gain 1 commodity. Then, convert all commodities to trade goods. At the end of this turn, return this card to the Veilstrike player.

name: Eyes of the Watcher
text: When another player activates a system that contains 1 or more of your infantry: for each adjacent system, you may move one of your non-fighter shups in that system into the active system. Then, return this card to the Convocation player

name: Pull the Thread
text: If you are not the Araenean player, you may reveal this card and choose a system that contains a weaveway token and none of your units. If you do, move that token into an adjacent system that contains 1 or more of your ships. Then, return this card to the Araenean player.

name: Authorization Warrant
text: When you recieve this card, if you are not the Keleres Player, you must place it face up in your play area. At the end of the status phase, draw 1 secret obkectove, place it face up in your play area, then return this card to the Keleres player.
